texto: All I say is: Let us leave les folles alone
autor: let's just leave them be. Don't judge them. You are not superior to them - don't put them down.
explicacao: Citação de let's just leave them be. Don't judge them. You are not superior to them - don't put them down. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “All I say is: Let us leave les folles alone” articula reflexao, john-irving, in-one-person em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como in-one-person.
